name: Axiom Space

overview.value: Axiom Space is an American privately funded space infrastructure developer headquartered in Houston, Texas. Founded in 2016, the company aims to own and operate a modular commercial space station in the late 2020s and provides human spaceflight and in-space research and manufacturing services.

focus.value: Commercial space station development, private astronaut missions, and in-space research and manufacturing

notes: Added in the audit Phase 3 backfill (2026-07-08), verify-then-add.
